textTranslated: The sunrise is very good to watch from here. However, the entrance fee is very high at $30 per person. If you're not specifically interested in the ruins, you should watch the sunrise and/or sunset from Pidurangala Rock instead. The entrance fee there is only 1000 LKR and the view is at least as good.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Алексей Бессмертный
text:
Поистине главная достопримечательность из глубокой древности на Шри-Ланке, которую обязательно стоит посетить, но есть несколько но.

1) Очень дорогой билет по необоснованно завышенной цене. 35$ - это чертовски дорого, особенно, если сравнивать с ценой в 37$ за входной билет на громадную территорию Ангкор-Ватта в Камбодже, где за 1 день можно посетить 3-5 больших храмовых комплексов. А здесь предлагают всего лишь одно место, куда ещё нужно карабкаться высоко в гору по узкой лестнице.

2) Действительно может впечатлить Сигирия только исключительно с воздуха. Но, как оказалось, на дроне здесь летать нельзя, хотя я это узнал, когда уже садил свой дрон и ко мне подбежали охранники.  Я с ними не стал спорить, просто извинился и ушел восвояси с отснятым материалом. Никогда не пойму запрета на съемку в подобных местах, ведь это же офигенная бесплатная реклама для них, а они запрещают и не объясняют почему. Кстати, таблички с запретом на полеты я увидел только на самом верху, а внизу их просто нет, поэтому, со спокойной душой запустил дрон.

3) Территорию комплекса в данный момент восстанавливают и реставрируют очень кустарным образом, когда я увидел, что они лепят кирпичи прямо сверху на древний фундамент, сделанные на скорую руку там же на месте из подручных материалов, у меня волосы зашевелились на голове. Это просто возмутительно!

4) «Официальная» версия от местных гидов о происхождении этого места - не выдерживает никакой критики. Совершенно точно, что это место куда более древнее и существовало задолго до царя Касапы.

С другой стороны, посетить подобное место и воочию увидеть шикарные виды, открывающиеся с его вершины - это бесценно, даже можно вообразить себя древним монахом, у которых были кельи в этой скале тысячи лет назад. Подъем довольно тяжелый, но в то же время не настолько, как может показаться, когда вы стоите внизу и видите невообразимо крутые лестницы на вершину.

И самое главное: не жалейте на Сигирию денег, раз уже сюда приехали и не вздумайте заменить посещение «львиной скалы» поднятием на соседнюю гору Пидурангулу - игра вообще не стоит свеч, хоть оттуда и открывается красивый вид на Сигирию. Поверьте мне, ведь я поднимался в прошлый раз на эту гору и теперь сравнил все это мероприятие с поднятием на Сигирию.
textTranslated:
Truly, Sri Lanka's premier ancient attraction is definitely worth a visit, but there are a few caveats.

1) The ticket is incredibly expensive and unreasonably inflated. $35 is incredibly expensive, especially compared to the $37 entrance fee to the vast Angkor Watt site in Cambodia, where you can visit 3-5 large temple complexes in a day. And here they offer only one site, which requires climbing a narrow staircase high up the mountain.

2) Sigiriya is truly impressive only from the air. But, as it turns out, drones are not allowed here, although I learned this only after I landed my drone and security guards ran up to me. I didn't argue with them, simply apologized, and left with the footage. I'll never understand the ban on photography in places like this. It's incredible free advertising for them, and yet they ban it without explaining why. Incidentally, I only saw signs prohibiting flights at the very top; there were none at the bottom, so I launched my drone with peace of mind.

3) The complex is currently being restored and renovated in a very crude manner. When I saw them slapping bricks directly onto the ancient foundation, hastily made on the spot from scrap materials, my hair stood on end. It's simply outrageous!

4) The "official" version from local guides about the origins of this place doesn't hold up to scrutiny. It's absolutely certain that this place is much more ancient and existed long before King Kasap.

On the other hand, visiting such a place and witnessing the magnificent views from its summit is priceless; you can even imagine yourself as an ancient monk who had cells in this rock thousands of years ago. The climb is quite strenuous, but not as difficult as it might seem when you're standing at the bottom and seeing the impossibly steep stairs to the top.

And most importantly: don't skimp on Sigiriya once you've arrived, and don't even think of replacing a visit to the "Lion Rock" with a climb to the neighboring Pidurangulu Mountain—it's not worth the effort, even though it offers a beautiful view of Sigiriya. Believe me, I climbed this mountain last time, and now I compare the whole experience to climbing Sigiriya.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Mikołaj
text: W mojej opinii miejsco nieco przereklamowane. Owszem kompleks ciekawy ale sama wspinaczka po tysiącu schodkach nudna i raczej nie warte to dość sporych pieniędzy które życzą sobie od turystów lokalsi. Zdecydowanie bardziej mi się podobało na pobliskiej Pidurangala gdzie wstęp był śmiesznie tani , drogą na szczyt znacznie bardziej ciekawsza (ale i wymagająca! - głazy, kamienie, szczeliny itp) a i sam widok z góry równie imponujący ale oferujący więcej przestrzeni i miejsca do podziwiania zachodu słońca czy po prostu relaksowania się.
textTranslated: In my opinion, this place is a bit overrated. The complex is interesting, but the climb up the thousand steps is tedious and probably not worth the rather large sums of money that locals charge tourists. I definitely liked the nearby Pidurangala better, where the entrance fee was ridiculously cheap, the route to the top was much more interesting (but also challenging – boulders, rocks, crevices, etc.), and the view from the top was equally impressive, but it offered more space and space to admire the sunset or simply relax.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Flora Selvacoumar
text:
Le site de Sigiriya offre une très belle vue une fois arrivé en haut du rocher. L’endroit est propre, bien organisé, et les infrastructures sont en bon état.

Cependant, il faut savoir que le prix d’entrée pour les étrangers est très élevé (environ 30 €), comparé aux 30 centimes payés par les locaux. Je trouve que le site est surcoté par rapport à ce qu’il propose réellement ^^
textTranslated:
The Sigiriya site offers a beautiful view once you reach the top of the rock. The site is clean, well-organized, and the infrastructure is in good condition.

However, you should be aware that the entrance fee for foreigners is very high (around €30), compared to the 30 cents paid by locals. I find the site overrated compared to what it actually offers. ^^

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Дина Маматова
text: Неплохая достопримечательность. Подъем по лестнице для нас был лёгкий. Минус в том, что лестница узкая и люди идут в обе стороны. Неудобно.
textTranslated: Not a bad attraction. The climb up the stairs was easy for us. The downside is that they're narrow, and people are walking in both directions. It's inconvenient.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Tony Cristofaro
text:
Très belle vue sur les montagnes et plaines  du Sri Lanka, monté facile en 30mn
Par contre prix trop élevé c’est limite honteux.. 35€/pers
textTranslated:
Beautiful views of the mountains and plains of Sri Lanka, an easy 30-minute climb.
On the other hand, the price is too high, it's almost shameful... €35/person.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Kevin Schutz
text:
Est-ce que c'est vraiment un incontournable ? Au vue du prix et du temps d'attente en plein soleil quasiment 2 H à piétiner pour monter et descendre...
Après effectivement le rocher est sympa vue du sol.
textTranslated:
Is it really a must-see? Considering the price and the wait in the blazing sun—almost two hours of trudging up and down...
Although the rock does look nice from the ground.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Oriental Tendency
text: La entrada cuesta unos 30$, la compramos en el museo y puedes pagar con tarjeta o efectivo. Subir y bajar a buen ritmo te costará 1 hora mas o menos. 1:30 si vas con calma. No es muy duro. Las vistas son bonitas pero quizás por el hype me esperaba más.
textTranslated: The entrance fee is around $30; we bought our tickets at the museum, and you can pay by card or cash. Going up and down at a good pace will take you about an hour, or 1.5 hours if you take it easy. It's not too strenuous. The views are nice, but perhaps because of the hype, I was expecting more.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: El Gringo
text:
Schöner Ausblick und auch interessant zu sehen, dass in dieser Höhe mit den damaligen Mitteln eine Festung errichtet wurde.
Die Eintrittspreise sind allerdings mit 36 USD pro Person recht hoch.
Unten bieten einem viele einheimische „Guides“ eine Führung auf den Felsen an. Hierfür verlangen sie ein Entgelt. Mit einem einfachen „Nein“ geben sie sich nicht immer zufrieden und sind oft aufdringlich.
textTranslated:
Beautiful view, and it's also interesting to see that a fortress was built at this altitude using the resources available at the time.

However, the entrance fees are quite high at $36 per person.

Down below, many local "guides" offer guided tours up the rock. They charge for this service. A simple "no" isn't always enough for them, and they are often pushy.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Jens Mankau
text: Beeindruckender Ort, sehr Geschichtsträchtig. Der Aufstieg ist anstrengend, aber lohnt sich wirklich. Toller Ausblick. Bitte ausreichend Wasser mitnehmen! Leider machen einem die selbsternannten "Guides" alles kaputt und wollen einem permanent das Geld aus der Tasche ziehen. Das nervt unglaublich.
textTranslated: Impressive place, steeped in history. The climb is strenuous, but absolutely worth it. Great views. Please bring plenty of water! Unfortunately, the self-proclaimed "guides" ruin everything and constantly try to rip you off. It's incredibly annoying.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: 翁祥坤
text:
一般，门票对兰卡留学生签证没有任何优惠，有点骗人！

爬上狮子岩，没有无人机 拍照效果差

比较推荐去隔壁的山拍狮子岩全景照片更好看，价格更低
textTranslated:
Generally speaking, the entrance fee doesn't offer any discounts for Sri Lankan student visas, which is a bit deceptive!

Climbing up Sigiriya Rock, without a drone, the photos were poor.

I recommend going to the neighboring mountain for better panoramic photos of Sigiriya Rock, which is also cheaper.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Jorge Aguirre
text:
No merece la pena pagarlo, demasiada gente, mucha gente desde primera hora, mucha cola para subir, bajar, ver los frescos.
No hay personal que atienda hasta la salida si hay algún problema como nos pasó a nosotros. Sufrimos una mordedura de mono en lo alto de la roca y tardamos una eternidad en volver a la entrada para que nos atendieran los primeros auxilios. Eso sí, el médico fue muy amable. Por lo demás tiene bonitas vistas.
textTranslated:
It's not worth the price; too many people, too many from the first hour, long lines to go up, down, and see the frescoes.
There's no staff to assist you until you exit if there's a problem, like ours. We were bitten by a monkey at the top of the rock, and it took us forever to get back to the entrance for first aid. The doctor was very kind, though. Otherwise, it has beautiful views.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Damian D
text: Skała wygląda imponująco i pięknie z każdej strony, ale cena za wejście 35usd to nieśmieszny żart. Cena obejmuje także ogrody pod skałą, więc nawet jak nie chcesz wejść na samą skalę tylko przejść się ogrodami to i tak musisz zapłacić za to 140zł. Polecam pojechać i wejść na pidurangala rock, skąd jest wspaniały widok na samą lwią skalę jak i na wszystko do okola i kosztuje to chyba 1000 rupii.
textTranslated: The rock looks impressive and beautiful from every angle, but the $35 entrance fee is a joke. The price also includes the gardens beneath the rock, so even if you don't want to climb the rock itself but just wander through the gardens, you'll still have to pay 140 złoty. I recommend going and climbing Pidurangala Rock, which offers a stunning view of the rock itself and everything around it. It costs about 1,000 rupees.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Benjamin Deja
text:
30 Dollar pro Person. Wir haben zu 2. 10920 Rupien gezahlt. Wirklich sehr sehr teuer für Sri Lanka.
Ansonsten ist die alte Anlage recht schön, der Weg nach oben zum Teil echt steil und auf alten verrosteten Stahltreppen. Ich habe starke Höhenangst, aber es war relativ problemlos zu bewältigen.
Von oben hat man einen sehr schönen Blick über die Gegend und man kann echt tolle Fotos machen.
Allerdings muss ich sagen, dass der Nachbarfelsen einen schöneren Weg nach oben hat, zum Teil auch abenteuerlicher und der Ausblick sich viel mehr lohnt. Zudem kostet dieser nur 500 Rupien pro Person. Vor allem der Blick auf den Sirigya Felsen ist bombastisch.
textTranslated:
$30 per person. The two of us paid 10,920 rupees. Really, really expensive for Sri Lanka.
Otherwise, the old complex is quite beautiful; the path up is quite steep in places and involves old, rusty steel stairs. I have a severe fear of heights, but it was relatively easy to manage.
From the top, you have a beautiful view of the area, and you can take some really great photos.
However, I have to say that the neighboring rock has a nicer path up, and in some places it's more adventurous, and the view is much more worthwhile. Plus, it only costs 500 rupees per person. The view of Sirigya Rock is especially spectacular.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Shania
text:
Während des Aufstiegs, welcher bei bequemen Tempo und gelegentlichem Stehenbleiben ca 45-60mim dauert, haben wir viel Sehen und bestaunen können. Es gibt auch immer wieder Infotafeln wodurch ein Tour Guide unserer Ansicht nach nicht unbedingt notwendig ist.
Negatives: wir fanden 30$ Eintritt etwas viel vorallem im Verhältnis zu sonstigen Eintrittspreisen hier. Außerdem waren wir sehr genervt davon dass alle 2 Minuten ein Mann zu uns kam, welcher uns eine Tour andrehen wollte. Am Tor Eingang hat der erste 25$ verlangt und kaum waren wir mit Ticket am Anfang der Tour reingekommen standen die ersten die das selbe für 100 Rupies angeboten haben. Vorsicht: sie fangen gerne an einem was zu erzählen aus „Nettigkeit“ und rennen dann hinterher und geben einem eine kostenpflichtige Tour wenn man sie nicht ausdrücklich abwimmelt.
Ansonsten absolut sehenswert :)
textTranslated:
During the climb, which took about 45-60 minutes at a comfortable pace and with occasional stops, we were able to see and marvel at a lot. There are also information boards scattered throughout, so a tour guide isn't absolutely necessary in our opinion.
Negatives: We found the $30 entrance fee a bit high, especially compared to other entrance fees here. We were also very annoyed that a man came up to us every two minutes trying to sell us a tour. At the gate, the first one asked us for $25, and as soon as we entered the tour with our tickets, the first people were there offering the same thing for 100 rupees. Be careful: they like to start talking to you out of "pleasantness" and then chase after you, offering you a paid tour if you don't explicitly refuse.
Otherwise, absolutely worth seeing :)

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Ann Willems
text: De plaats en wat te zien is geweldig. De prijs die ze nu vragen is van 12 naar 30 euro gestegen. En dan is de vraag of je dat wil betalen. Voordeel van de hoge prijs er was niet veel volk.☺️ Ieder nadeel heeft zijn voordeel 😀
textTranslated: The place and the sights are amazing. The price they're asking has gone up from 12 to 30 euros. And then the question is whether you're willing to pay that. The upside of the high price is that it wasn't crowded. ☺️ Every cloud has a silver lining 😀

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Nemo vh
text: Wij vonden de kaartjes wel erg duur in vergelijking met hetgeen wat je krijgt. Het museum is erg klein en minmaal opgezet en er is zonder gids weinig informatie te verkrijgen over deze rots. Het uitzicht is wel fenomenaal. De apen daarentegen zijn uiterst brutaal en agressief, zelfs als je enkel langs ze loopt.
textTranslated: We found the tickets quite expensive compared to what you get. The museum is very small and minimal, and without a guide, there's little information available about this rock. The view is phenomenal, though. The monkeys, on the other hand, are extremely bold and aggressive, even if you just walk past them.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Alex M
text: Не понимаю, за что люди ставят Пять звёзд этому месту. Оно не стоит их и тех 30 долларов которые просят за вход .красивые виды Сверху? Мне кажется Вы многого не видели если он кажется вам красивым. обычные виды. вид в Карпатах несоизмеримо красивее. или же горы на Кипре - вообще несравнимо красивее и бесплатно, к слову. Поднимался рано утром в несезон и всё равно была толпа народу на подъем весьма жарко наверху и при спуске. Есть музей внизу-ничего особенного. Бегают обезьянки забавные но запросто могут проявить агрессию: у ребёнка, который шёл передо мной, вытащили из рюкзака какую-то упаковку.
textTranslated: I don't understand why people give this place five stars. It's not worth it, nor is it worth the $30 entrance fee. Beautiful views from above? I think you haven't seen much if you think it's beautiful. Just ordinary views. The views in the Carpathians are incomparably more beautiful. Or the mountains in Cyprus—incomparably more beautiful, and free, by the way. I climbed up early in the morning during the off-season, and there were still crowds of people on the way up. It's quite hot at the top and on the way down. There's a museum down below—nothing special. The monkeys running around are funny, but they can easily get aggressive: someone stole some kind of package from the backpack of the child walking in front of me.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Marco Ramming
text: Im Gegensatz zu den meisten anderen Rezensenten, finde ich nicht, dass der Preis von 30$ irgendwie zu rechtfertigen ist. Ja, die Aussicht ist bombastisch und es ist schon ein spezieller und kulturell bedeutender Fels, aber wozu dieser Preis? Das Museum, dessen Eintritt im Preis enthalten ist erzählt die gesamte Geschichte in etwa 10 Minuten. Der Aufstieg selbst ist gut mit Stufen ausgebaut und recht schnell zu bewältigen. Da ich am Morgen dort war hatte ich zum Glück keine Menschenmassen vor mir, wie in anderen Bewertungen beschrieben. Zusammengefasst finde ich es ziemlich frech aus Natur und Geschichte dermaßen Kapital zu schlagen - empfehle Sigiriya dennoch als must see. Nur ob man wirklich hoch muss und nicht lieber vom benachbarten Berg draufschaut, sollte man vorher abwägen.
textTranslated: Unlike most other reviewers, I don't think the $30 price is justifiable. Yes, the view is stunning and it's a special and culturally significant rock, but why the price? The museum, whose entrance fee is included in the price, tells the entire story in about 10 minutes. The climb itself is well-developed with steps and can be completed quite quickly. Since I was there in the morning, there were fortunately no crowds ahead of me, as described in other reviews. In summary, I think it's pretty cheeky to capitalize on nature and history like this - but I still recommend Sigiriya as a must-see. But you should consider beforehand whether you really need to go up there and wouldn't rather just look at it from the neighboring mountain.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Ronny Riera Villalva
text: 30 dólares por la entrada a extranjeros es excesivo. Tardamos 30 minutos en subir hasta la cima. La subida no es demasiado complicada. Son 1200 escalones.
textTranslated: $30 for entry to the temple is excessive. It took us 30 minutes to climb to the top. The climb isn't too difficult. There are 1,200 steps.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: p p
text:
2023年5月頃よりクレジットカード利用可能。離れた売店にATMもある。
なお入場料は9800スリランカルピーとコロナ前の倍近い。
textTranslated:
Credit cards will be accepted from around May 2023. There is also an ATM at a nearby shop. 
The admission fee is 9,800 Sri Lankan rupees, nearly double the price before COVID-19.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Endless
text: Es demasiado caro para lo que es (30 USD para los turistas). Es un atraco tratándose de una montaña que se ve rápido y son todo escaleras. Las vistas están bonitas pero me quedo sin duda con las vistas de su hermana pequeña, la montaña Pidurangala, que además se ve la propia Lion's Rock y la subida es mucho más amena. Si vais, mejor a primera hora porque el calor es insufrible.
textTranslated: It's far too expensive for what it is (US$30 for tourists). It's a rip-off considering it's a mountain you can see quickly, and it's all stairs. The views are nice, but I definitely prefer the views from its little sister, Pidurangala Mountain, where you can also see Lion's Rock itself, and the climb is much more pleasant. If you go, it's best to go early in the morning because the heat is unbearable.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Rubeniko3 warframe
text: Precio bastante desorbitado para lo que es las vistas son mas o menos las mismas que pidurangala la qual vale 1000rupias solo y puedes ver amanecer y atardecer racomendable ir a las 5am para ver el amanecer lo unico que parece q siempre esta muy lleno de turistas pero como no ir a ver un amanecer en plena selva!
textTranslated: The price is quite exorbitant for what it is; the views are more or less the same as Pidurangala, which costs 1000 rupees and lets you see both sunrise and sunset. It's recommended to go at 5 am to see the sunrise. The only downside is that it always seems very crowded with tourists, but why not go see a sunrise in the middle of the jungle!

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Pasha Ovchinnikov
text: Вход на гору стоит 35 баксов . Идти нужно толпой , маленькими шагами по ступенькам. Вид с горы на любителя. Не знаю кому то может очень понравиться , но явно не для всех .
textTranslated: Entrance to the mountain costs $35. You have to go in a crowd, taking small steps up the stairs. The view from the mountain is an acquired taste. I don't know if someone will really like it, but it's definitely not for everyone.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: F G
text: Weltkulturerbe und damit fast Pflicht zu besuchen. Es ist auch ein Erlebnis die Stufen hoch zu gehen, man sollte einigermaßen Schwindelfrei sein. Wolkenmädchen auch sehr schön aber all in all ist der Eintrittspreis vollkommen absurd und wenn man als Familie hochgeht ist man pleite und so besonders war es dann leider doch nicht..
textTranslated: A World Heritage Site, and therefore almost a must-see. Climbing the steps is quite an experience, but you should have a good head for heights. The Cloud Maiden sculpture is also very beautiful, but all in all, the entrance fee is completely absurd, and if you go as a family, you'll be broke. So, unfortunately, it wasn't all that special after all.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Olga
text: Не понятен ажиотаж вокруг этого места. Кроме того что эта была самая дорогая экскурсия на острове, удовольствие от неё получить тоже толком не получилось. Количество людей в очереди за билетами и на самой горе просто зашкаливает.
textTranslated: I can't understand the hype around this place. Besides being the most expensive excursion on the island, it wasn't really enjoyable. The number of people in line for tickets and on the mountain itself was simply off the charts.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Jonathan Fischbach
text: Cher, la vue est tout aussi belle sur le sommet à côté avec le temple et bien moins cher ! Belle vue également du lac à proximité
textTranslated: Dear customer, the view is just as beautiful from the summit next door with the temple, and much cheaper! There's also a lovely view of the nearby lake.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Sebastian Orbenes
text:
Valor 30 USD/4650 LKR, Al parecer quieren igualar los precios de otros países como USA,Nz,Australia, etc. Cosa que creo que es descarado, al saber que ingresa dinero y se invierte poco o nada en la señalética, instalaciones que existen en el sitio.
Lo malo, es que te tratan como ganado cuando estás viendo las pinturas, los sinhales tienen complejo de superioridad sobre todos, empujando y tratando despectivamente.
Lion Rock bonito, lo malo turistas no respetan las señalética.
Por último ojo con las avispas ya que por algo hay señalética de no molestarlas, estuvimos alrededor de 1 hra o quizás más atrapados arriba de Lion Rock, porque unos tipos molestaron a las avispas y estas los atacaron, y empezaron a correr por todo elsitio, ahi adjunte una foto como había que bajar después del incidente ( bajo una malla)

Resumen : Féliz pago 15 USD pero 30USD es un robo, no el mejor trato siendo toda la plata que te sacan , instalaciones sin buena señalética. Ojo con las avispas y Harto Bloqueador Solar!
textTranslated:
Price: $30 USD/$4,650 LKR. Apparently, they want to match the prices of other countries like the USA, New Zealand, Australia, etc. Which I think is shameless, considering the money they bring in and little or no investment in the signage, which is already installed on the site.
The bad thing is that they treat you like cattle when you're looking at the paintings. The Sinhalese have a superiority complex over everyone, pushing and treating you with contempt.
Lion Rock is beautiful, but the bad thing is that tourists don't respect the signage.
Finally, be careful with the wasps, as there's a reason they're posted. We were trapped for about an hour or maybe more above Lion Rock because some guys disturbed the wasps, and they attacked them and started running all over the place. I've attached a photo of how to get down after the incident (under a mesh net).

Summary: I happily paid $15, but $30 is a rip-off. Not the best deal considering all the money they're taking. The facilities aren't well-signed. Watch out for the wasps, and loads of sunscreen!

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Frits van der Heide
text: Mooi uitzicht, klim is redelijk te doen voor mensen met gemiddelde conditie
textTranslated: Beautiful view, climb is quite doable for people with average fitness

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Sara M
text:
الطبيعه حلوه بس جيتها في ويكند والزحمه مريعه تذاكرها يالاجانب الشخص ٣٠ دولار  والسيرلانكين دولار واحد !!

ما رقيت فوق كان زحمه و حر ،تمشيت تحت و طلعت ..
textTranslated:
The scenery is beautiful, but I went on a weekend and the crowds were awful. Tickets cost $30 per person for foreigners and only $1 for Sri Lankans!

I didn't go upstairs because it was too crowded and hot. I walked around downstairs and then went upstairs.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: 라니
text:
경관 자체는 너무 좋아요
꼭대기에서 바라보는 전망도 좋고요
웅장합니다
별 두개를 뺀 이유는
1. 올라가는 철계단이 너무 좁아요
꽤 무섭습니다
철계단을 따라 미인도를 봐야하는 구조인데
줄이 너무 길고 계속 걸어가면서 봐야해서
제대로 볼수가 없어요
2. 새치기 장난 아닙니다 ㅎㅎ
왕복 한시간이면 충분할 거리를
땡볕에 3시간을 오르락 내리락 했어요
스리랑카 사람들 틈만 보이면 줄줄이
끼어드니 사람 없는 시간에 올라가세요
textTranslated:
The view itself is amazing.
The view from the top is also great.
It's magnificent.
The reasons I deducted two stars are because:
1. The iron stairs leading up are too narrow.
It's quite scary.
You have to walk along the iron stairs to see the Beauty Painting,
but the line is so long that you have to keep walking to see it.
2. The queue cutting is no joke.
It should only take an hour for a round trip.
I spent three hours going up and down in the blazing sun.
Sri Lankans will always line up to get in, so go when there aren't many people.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Mirco S.
text: Preparatevi ad una delle esperienze più difficili del vostro tour in Srilanka. Ci vogliono 4 ore per arrivare in vetta quando c è molta gente. Una lunghissima fila di gente tutta schiacciata nell'unica scala presente per poter raggiungere il picco. I singalesi cercano in tutti i modi di superare anche se si è tutti schiacciati. 3 ore di contatto con persone molto sudate e maleducate. Tutti vogliono arrivare su prima e si è incredibilmente schiacciati in una bolgia di sudore e odori. Portatevi assolutamente dell'acqua e qualcosina da mangiare. Non ci sono vie di fuga, se pensate di poter stare male non andateci. Non ci sono gabinetti lungo la salita. Esperienza terribile ma presto dimenticata vedendo il panorama in cima. PREPARATEVI PSICOLOGICAMENTE ALLA FILA.
textTranslated: Prepare yourself for one of the most difficult experiences of your Sri Lanka tour. It takes four hours to reach the summit when there are many people. A very long line of people crammed into the only staircase available to reach the peak. The Sri Lankans try their best to get past even though everyone is packed in. Three hours of contact with very sweaty and rude people. Everyone wants to get to the top first, and you're incredibly squeezed in a cauldron of sweat and smells. Be sure to bring water and something to eat. There are no escape routes; if you think you might get sick, don't go. There are no restrooms along the way. A terrible experience, but quickly forgotten when you see the view at the summit. PREPARE YOURSELF PSYCHOLOGICALLY FOR THE LINE.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: blue
text: 高所恐怖症の方は、かなりな心構えが必要です。登りは、まあまあ行けますが、下りは、かなり腰が引けます。
textTranslated: If you are afraid of heights, you need to be prepared. You can climb up the mountain, but descending is quite daunting.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Elisabetta Puccetti
text: Interessante la camminata e il paesaggio intorno, tutta giungla. Il sito è ben tenuto, dal punto di vista archeologico niente di che, per chi ha visto l'Egitto, l'antica Roma, la Grecia e Magna Grecia. Il biglietto è molto caro per quello che si vede, comunque vale la pena andare.
textTranslated: The walk and the surrounding landscape are interesting, all jungle. The site is well-maintained, but archaeologically it's nothing special, especially for those who have seen Egypt, Ancient Rome, Greece, and Magna Graecia. The ticket is quite expensive for what you see, but it's worth it.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Tine Tine
text: leider viel zu ünberlaufen
textTranslated: Unfortunately, it's far too crowded.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Chu Justin
text: 一人US30的門票，還要被人騷擾，一開始說是不用錢，到最後要1000盧布，只給300愛要不要，也是收了。
textTranslated: The ticket cost US30 per person, and I was harassed. At first, they said it was free, but in the end they asked for 1,000 rubles. I only gave them 300. It was up to me whether I wanted it or not, but I still had to pay.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Bastien POULET
text:
Expérience mitigée... c'est clairement magnifique : beauté des paysages, histoire du lieu, effort archéologique pour restaurer le site...
Mais alors on vous prend vraiment pour un pigeon qui vient se faire plumer ! 35US$ l'entrée pour les étrangers !!! C'est à dire 100 (!!!) fois plus que le les "locaux" qui payent 120 Roupies (ce qui est également ridiculement bas, je vous l'accorde). Je mets des guillemets à "locaux" parce que locaux = nationalité Sri Lankaise. J'ai eu beau expliquer que j'avais un visa de résident et qu'à ce titre je payais des impôts au Sri Lanka, rien à faire. Donc cette histoire de tarif et de discrimination au passeport (pas sûr que ce soit légal, d'ailleurs, je vais creuser) m’a un peu pourri la visite, ce qui était dommage parce que le site est superbe.
Donc voilà je vous laisse vous faire votre avis sur l'intérêt d'y aller. Si on le sait à l'avance c'est probablement plus facile à avaler...
textTranslated:
Mixed experience... it's clearly magnificent: beautiful landscapes, history of the place, archaeological efforts to restore the site...
But then you really feel like a sucker who's come to be plucked! $35 US entry for foreigners!!! That's 100 (!!!) times more than the "locals" who pay 120 rupees (which is also ridiculously low, I grant you). I put "locals" in quotation marks because locals = Sri Lankan nationality. I tried to explain that I had a resident visa and as such paid taxes in Sri Lanka, but it didn't work. So this whole issue of fees and passport discrimination (not sure it's legal, by the way, I'll look into it) spoiled my visit a bit, which was a shame because the site is superb.
So, I'll let you make up your own mind about whether or not you should go. If you know it in advance, it's probably easier to swallow...

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Vanesa Dugonjic
text: Vstopnina 35Usd, sam vzpon ni naporen, je pa vreden razgleda.
textTranslated: Entrance fee 35USD, the climb itself is not strenuous, but the view is worth it.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Arys Dembinski
text:
Ciekawostka, ale słonie spędzają dużo czasu pr,ywiazane łańcuchami.
Typowa rozrywka dla mas
textTranslated:
Interestingly, elephants spend a lot of time chained up.

Typical entertainment for the masses

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Séverine D.
text:
Site qui mérite d’être vu mais ce n’est pas non plus exceptionnel.
Ça ne mérite pas 35$.
textTranslated:
A site worth seeing, but it's nothing special.
It's not worth $35.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Jason Watte
text: Artrappe touriste 35$ pour les touristes et 0,35 cent pour les locaux , juste pour monter au dessus et redescendre
textTranslated: Tourist Artrappe $35 for tourists and 0.35 cents for locals, just to go up and down

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Sven Bartel
text: Schönes gepflegtes Ausflugsziel aber 30$ Eintritt ist extrem grenzwertig.
textTranslated: A nice, well-maintained destination, but the $30 entrance fee is extremely excessive.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Marta Serrano
text: Me encanto lo que es sigiriya, sus animales, su gente pero vi dos cosas que me asustaron demasiado. Año 2025 y los turistas pagaban por subirse a un elefante encadenado por las calles y subirse a carretas de bueyes por la foto. Sin contar la de animales abandonados en la calle en mal estado. Una lastima q permitan todo y los turistas hagan cualquier cosa por su foto
textTranslated: I loved Sigiriya, its animals, and its people, but I saw two things that really scared me. It's 2025, and tourists were paying to ride a chained elephant through the streets and to climb onto oxcarts for a photo. Not to mention all the abandoned animals in terrible condition on the streets. It's a shame they allow all this and that tourists will do anything for a picture.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: PBC Helper
text: متعب وليس بواقعي، قصص من تأليف الغير خاصة ان راس الأسد اختفا والقصر اختفا
textTranslated: It's tiring and unrealistic; these are stories made up by others, especially since the lion's head disappeared and the palace disappeared.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: 띠옹 (띠옹)
text:
정상에서  내려오다 보면  외국인을 위한 주차장이  있는데 이곳에서는  모든게  바가지더군
심지어 물까지도
textTranslated: Coming down from the top, there's a parking lot for foreigners, but everything here is a mess. Even the water.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: damian grabarski
text:
Szczerze - nie ma tam nic ciekawego. Na szczycie i w ogrodach są tylko fundamenty po budowlach. Kilka malowidel i ze dwie ciekawe skały.

W 2024 chca lekko ponad 36 dolarów od osoby co jest okropną ceną, zupełnie nieadekwatna do zawartości
textTranslated:
Honestly, there's nothing interesting there. At the summit and in the gardens, there are only the foundations of buildings. A few paintings and a couple of interesting rock formations.

In 2024, they're asking just over $36 per person, which is a ridiculous price, completely disproportionate to the content.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Bambou Huron
text: Cest vraiment hors de prix ! 35$ on a une bien meilleure vue depuis le treck en face et seulement 1000 roupies :)
textTranslated: That's ridiculously expensive! For $35 you get a much better view from the trek opposite, and it's only 1000 rupees :)

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Gert-Jan Greuter
text:
Moeilijk te zeggen of je hier nu 3 of 4 sterren moet geven.  Vanuit archeologisch oogpunt overigens wel 5 sterren, mooie site om door te wandelen.
Matig is dat ticket Office voor buitenlanders in het museum is en voor locals langs het pad vanaf de parkeerplaats.
Je kan gratis buitenom het complex lopen (buiten de gracht is dat). (Je kan dus niet gratis naar de leeuwenpoten lopen!)
Kids die nog niet veel kunnen lopen even meenemen in een kinderdrager, kinderwagen werkt niet met alle trappen.
Voor de leeuwenpoten moet je ook al wat trappen op. De rots is goed te doen, de trappen zijn goed en iemand met een goede conditie rent zo naar boven. (Anders neem je tijd, rustig aan, en je komt er vanzelf).
De zon kan inderdaad best branden (weinig schaduw in de klim naar boven, houd daar rekening mee)
De klim naar Lion rock is overigens vele malen makkelijker dan het kleine broertje Pidurangala rock, omdat laatst genoemde geen trappen heeft.
Museum is niet groot, wel lekker om na de klim even bij het café als je naar museum terug loopt ijsje of wat koels te halen. Museum airco is lekker verkoelend. Inhoudelijk met name in het airco gedeelte nog wel de moeite waard om even mee te pakken (je hebt er immers toch voor betaald).

Als site note; ik snap niet waarom mensen uit een SAARC land minder betalen dan een westerling… (voelt discriminerend en zou niet nodig zijn lijkt me)
textTranslated:
It's hard to say whether to give this 3 or 4 stars. From an archaeological perspective, it deserves 5 stars, though. It's a beautiful site to walk through.
A minor drawback is that the ticket office for foreigners is located in the museum, while for locals it's along the path from the parking lot.
You can walk around the perimeter of the complex for free (that's outside the moat). (So, you can't walk to the Lion's Paws for free!)
Bring children who aren't yet able to walk much in a child carrier, as strollers don't work on all the stairs.
You do have to climb some stairs to reach the Lion's Paws. The rock itself is manageable; the stairs are good, and someone in good shape can easily run up. (Otherwise, take your time, take it easy, and you'll get there naturally).
The sun can indeed be quite hot (there's little shade on the climb, so keep that in mind).
The climb to Lion Rock is, incidentally, much easier than its smaller counterpart, Pidurangala Rock, because the latter doesn't have any stairs. The museum isn't large, but it's nice to grab an ice cream or something cold at the café on your way back after the climb. The museum's air conditioning is nice and cool. The content, especially in the air-conditioned section, is worth checking out (after all, you paid for it).

As a side note: I don't understand why people from a SAARC country pay less than a Westerner... (it feels discriminatory and shouldn't be necessary, I think).

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Kamil Wdowczyk
text: Szliśmy na wschód słońca. Widoki bardzo ładne, droga bardzo prosta, nie bierz przewodnika. Jednak cena stanowczo za wysoka. Nie można latać dronem.
textTranslated: We hiked to see the sunrise. The views were beautiful, the route was very straight, so don't take a guide. However, the price was definitely too high. Drones aren't allowed.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Brian
text: 외국인 입장료 $36.. 유지보수를 얼마나 안하는지 철봉 녹이 손에 다 묻어나니 물티슈 필요.. 입장료가 비싸서 근처 파두랑갈라 언덕(1000루피)도 대안이라고 하는데 그래도 먼곳가서 안가기도 그런..
textTranslated: The entrance fee for foreigners is $36.. The horizontal bar is so rusty that it's all over your hands because they don't do much maintenance. You need wet tissues.. The entrance fee is expensive, so they say that the nearby Padurangala Hill (1000 rupees) is an alternative, but it's still too far to not go..

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Gabe Hiemstra
text: Fantastisch mooie plek van veel historische waarde. En een prachtig uitzicht. Maar... Buitenlanders betalen letterlijk 100x zoveel als lokalen. En dat terwijl de naambordjes half kapot zijn en het museum zich in een verloederde staat verkeerd. Jammer.
textTranslated: A fantastically beautiful place with great historical value. And a stunning view. But... Foreigners literally pay 100x more than locals. And all this while the nameplates are half broken and the museum is in a dilapidated state. Such a shame.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: MIYU. JP
text:
外国人は高額$30、つきまとってくるガイド料金$15。敷地内にATMあります。
45分で登れました。たいてい、景色は霞んでます。階段は岩を傷つけ建てた物で、鉄製で、錆あり。帰り道は、足元を見ると怖いです。シギリヤロックは、登るところではない、眺めるところだ。景色を見たいなら、隣の小さい岩でいいかもしれません。
textTranslated:
The fee for foreigners is a steep $30, and the harassing guide is $15. There is an ATM on the premises.
It took 45 minutes to climb. The view is usually hazy. The stairs were made of iron and were built by cutting into the rock, so they are rusty. On the way back, it was scary to look down. Sigiriya Rock is not a place to climb, it's a place to look at. If you want a view, the smaller rock next to it might be better.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Александра Панаева
text: Место красивое, но убила цена за входной билет 30$ с человека. Если пришли семьей будь добр выложи кругленькую сумму. У нас это 150$😭. Было бы здорово если бы сделали семейный билет со скидкой.
textTranslated: The place is beautiful, but the entrance fee is a killer: $30 per person. If you're coming with your family, be kind enough to shell out a hefty sum. It's $150 for us. 😭 It would be great if they offered a discounted family ticket.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: dick van rij
text: mooie plek van een afstandje, maar om daar nu 26,50 euro voor te betalen om.met nog eens 1000 mensen daar te zijn, dan is Pirudangila met uitzicht op deze rots een stuk beter, zorg dat je om 05.40 boven bent
textTranslated: Beautiful place from a distance, but to pay 26.50 euros for it to be there with another 1000 people, Pirudangila with a view of this rock is much better, make sure you're up there by 5:40 am

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Oliver Panarotto
text: Es ist wirklich sehr schön dort, und das Objekt ist sehenswert, aber ich finde es ungerecht ca. So viel Eintritt wie 120 einheimische zu bezahlen. 30 usd pro ausländer Nase plus guite, da soll man nochmal 25usd bezahlen .... deshalb gibt es weinge Touristen dort. Ich würde schon mehr geben aber auf spendenbasis. Was mir auch nicht gefällt, das man für den preis keine schöne eintrittskarte oder ein Prospekt als errinnerung erhält. Das opjekt ist 5 sterne wert, der preis allerdings-5 Sterne !!!!!
textTranslated: It's truly beautiful there, and the object is worth seeing, but I think it's unfair to pay roughly the same entrance fee as 120 locals. $30 per foreigner plus a ticket, so you have to pay another $25... which is why there are so few tourists there. I would give more, but only on a donation basis. What I also don't like is that you don't get a nice ticket or a souvenir brochure for the price. The object is worth 5 stars, but the price—5 stars!!!!!

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Ani de Rus
text: La roca es preciosa, las vistas también, pero el lugar está masificado y la entrada es muy cara. Hemos venido en domingo, no sé si tendrá algo que ver para que haya tanta gente, pero no repetiría.
textTranslated: The rock is beautiful, as are the views, but the place is crowded and admission is very expensive. We came on Sunday; I don't know if it has anything to do with the crowds, but I wouldn't go back.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Nesterov family channel
text: Не впечатлило не вида не чего только толпы народу В пешей доступности находится похожая скала Пидурангала вид оттуда намного лучше и дешевле!!!
textTranslated: I wasn't impressed by the view of anything, only crowds of people. There is a similar rock called Pidurangala within walking distance, the view from there is much better and cheaper!!!

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: C T
text:
登高望遠廣大熱帶雨林
小部份壁畫
膝蓋要不錯非常多階梯，非常熱
美中不足剛入園會有很多當地人纏著你要做生意，好像是要幫你被行李，甚至會碰觸或拉人，蠻不好的體驗
textTranslated:
Climb up to see the vast tropical rainforest
Some murals
Good knees are required. Lots of stairs. Very hot
On the downside, there are a lot of locals who will pester you to do business when you first enter the park. They seem to want to help you with your luggage. They may even touch or pull you. It's a bad experience

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Sree Ganesha
text:
Superbe site, bien entretenu. Vue à couper le souffle…
Mais payer 36$ en tant que touriste versus 120 SKR pour les locaux ( environ 35 cents), est ce vraiment équitable ?
textTranslated: Stunning site, well-maintained. Breathtaking view… But paying $36 as a tourist versus 120 SKR for locals (about 35 cents), is that really fair?

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: hklauhklau Lau
text: 山不很高，上落途中人多，上山早段已要排隊，有條旋轉樓梯，有特色,到山頂可360度望週邊環境,遺址不多，有關磚牆、水池等，落山下段分開,不用跟上山擠在一起，可以一去!
textTranslated: The mountain isn't very high, but there are many people going up and down. You have to queue early on the way up. There's a unique spiral staircase. At the top, you can enjoy a 360-degree view of the surrounding environment. There aren't many historical sites, just some brick walls and pools. The descent is separate from the ascent, so you don't have to squeeze in with the ascent. It's worth a visit!

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Maeen Alfaqeeh
text: سيجيريا (بالإنجليزية: Sigiriya)‏ وهي مدينة تقع في محافظة ماتيل Matale والتي تقع في منتصف سريلانكا وهي تقع شمال شرق كولومبو وتبعد عنها حوالي 180 كم، وتبعد قرابة الساعة جنوب مدينة أنورادابورا والتي يوجد بها مطار للرحلات الداخلية وهي قريبة جداً من مدينة دمبولا التي تقع جنوبها تسمى المنطقة والتي تشمل سيجيريا ودمبولا و أنورادهابورا بالمثلث الثقافي وهي أحد مناطق التراث العالمي وتشتهر بوجود تلك الصخرة التي بنى عليها أحد ملوك سريلانكا القديمة قلعته. و الصخرة عبارة عن كتلة من الصخور البركانية القديمة جداً ويبلغ ارتفاعها عن سطح البحر 337 م ومنها يمكنك رؤية المنطقة المحيطة بكاملها .
textTranslated: Sigiriya is a town located in the Matale District of central Sri Lanka, about 180 km northeast of Colombo. It is approximately an hour south of Anuradhapura, which has a domestic airport, and very close to Dambulla. The area encompassing Sigiriya, Dambulla, and Anuradhapura is known as the Cultural Triangle, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. It is famous for the rock upon which one of Sri Lanka's ancient kings built his fortress. This ancient volcanic rock rises 337 meters above sea level, offering panoramic views of the surrounding area.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Mica S.
text: Cher (30USD/adulte) et très chaud en cette periode (début avril). Pour le prix de l’entrée il y a aussi le musée qui est parfait pour récupérer de la chaleur étouffante si vous commencez la visite autours de 9h le matin, et aussi pour saisir les choses que vous n’auriez pas pu voir à la montée.
textTranslated: Expensive (30USD/adult) and very hot at this time of year (early April). For the entrance fee there is also the museum which is perfect for recovering from the stifling heat if you start the visit around 9am in the morning, and also for capturing things you wouldn't have been able to see on the way up.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Lorenzo Cerato
text:
Bel posto...panorama emozionante.
Solamente credo che per il prezzo di 35 euro per il biglietto d'entrata per turisti non valga assolutamente la pena.
Camminate tanto in salita schiacciati da tutta la gente che c'è e basta.
textTranslated:
Beautiful place... breathtaking view.
I just don't think the 35 euro tourist ticket is worth it at all.
You walk a long way uphill, crushed by all the people there.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Kurt Signer
text: Sicherlich sehenswert. Aber Eintritt ist viel zu teuer. Niemals an einem public holiday besuchen, dann gibts Wartezeiten von bis zu 3 Stunden für den Aufstieg. Am besten ist man am Morgen um 7 Uhr dort, dann kann der Aufstieg genossen werden. Die guides verlangen auch zuviel Geld, vorsicht. Ist halt ein richtiger Touriort.
textTranslated: Certainly worth seeing. But the entrance fee is far too expensive. Never visit on a public holiday, as you'll have to wait up to three hours for the climb. It's best to get there at 7 a.m., so you can enjoy the climb. The guides also charge too much, so be careful. It's a real tourist destination.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Michael Mokros
text:
Fangen wir mit den guten Dingen an. Der Ausblick ist wirklich toll und es ist wirklich toll wenn man einmal oben angekommen ist,.fühlt man sich schon ein Stückchen besser ;)

Preislich ist es aber ultimative teuer... 30 Dollar für Touris und 50 Rupien für Einheimische. Böse finde ich das...
textTranslated:
Let's start with the good things. The view is truly amazing, and it's really great once you get to the top; you definitely feel a bit better ;)

However, it's incredibly expensive... $30 for tourists and 50 rupees for locals. I think that's outrageous...

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Илья Земсков
text: Не дешёвый входной билет (35$) и орды туристов. На вершине оградки по периметру. От крепости толком ничего не осталось. У подножья можно прогуляться по садам и посмотреть ров. В пешей доступности находится похожая скала Пидурангала. Там не так много туристов, вход намного дешевле (500лкр), более живописный подъем и никаких оградок. Местные ребята рекомендуют уделить внимание именно Пидурангале, а Сигирии и я с ними солидарен.
textTranslated: The entrance fee is not cheap ($35) and there are hordes of tourists. At the top, there are fences around the perimeter. Nothing much remains of the fortress. At the foot, you can stroll through the gardens and explore the moat. A similar rock, Pidurangala, is within walking distance. It's less crowded, the entrance fee is much cheaper (500 rubles), the climb is more scenic, and there are no fences. Locals recommend Pidurangala in particular, while Sigiriya is worth a visit, and I agree.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: nathalie
text: Prix excessif 36 dollars, pour accéder au site, qui n'a pas été un coup de cœur
textTranslated: Excessive price of 36 dollars to access the site, which was not a favorite

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: ДМИТРИЙ ИЕВЛЕВ
text: Сумасшедшей дорогой билет за так себе место. Обезьяна украла у меня банан.
textTranslated: A crazy expensive ticket for a so-so seat. A monkey stole my banana.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Винни Пух
text: Цена не оправдана для иностранцев. Подняться можно только для очивки. На вершине виды классные, но таких видов на Шри много, причем бесплатно.
textTranslated: The price is not justified for foreigners. You can climb only to clear your head. The views at the top are great, but there are many views like this on Sri Lanka, and for free.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Sergey Maximenko
text:
Со скалы открываются красивые виды, но не при всякой погоде. При солнце жарко, при облачной пейзаж затянет дымкой. В остальном все целенаправленно уничтожено — фрески монахами, остальное временем.  В наличии неоправданно дорогой входной билет, обильные рассказы "когда-то эти ступени были полированные, а тут были тысячи изображений наложниц. Воду берите с собой, на скале ее не продают. От гигантского льва остались одни лапы. Представьте, что в Египте вы смотрите вместо пирамид стройплощадку с заложенным фундаментом для нее.
Дополнительно, присутствует джек-пот в виде атаки диких ос, когда на скалу вас не пустят, и деньги за билет не вернут.
Посмотреть скалу стоит, если денег не жалко, но восторгов я не понимаю.
textTranslated:
The cliff offers beautiful views, but not in all weather conditions. It's hot in the sun, and when it's cloudy the landscape will be covered in haze. Otherwise, everything has been deliberately destroyed - the frescoes by monks, the rest by time. There is an unreasonably expensive entrance ticket, abundant stories "once these steps were polished, and here were thousands of images of concubines. Take water with you, they don't sell it on the cliff. Only paws are left of the giant lion. Imagine that in Egypt you are looking at a construction site with a foundation laid for it instead of the pyramids. 
Additionally, there is a jackpot in the form of an attack of wild wasps, when you will not be allowed on the cliff, and the money for the ticket will not be returned. 
It is worth seeing the cliff if you don't mind the money, but I don't understand the enthusiasm.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Puericultura Lara
text:
Es una turistada y no de las baratas (unos 30€.)
Fuimos en domingo, que se ve que es el peor día porque acuden también muchos locales. La cola era inmensa y la parte más bonita, las pinturas, la tuvimos que ver en menos de 2 minutos.
Si tienes la mala pata de encontrarte una cola que parece no avanzar, toma las escaleras laterales aptas sólo para turistas. Están a mano derecha cuando terminan los jardines.
En la parte superior sólo se conservan las garras del león, el resto son ruinas.
De todos modos, aconsejo ir para ver los jardines inferiores y las vistas, pero subiendo a Pidurangala Rock, la colina gratuíta que hay al lado.
Si no vas con guía, infórmate antes sobre la curiosa historia de esta fortaleza.
Datos de transporte: Habarana es un pueblo-cruce muy bien comunicado con Polonnaruwa, Sigiriya y Dambulla. Los autobuses pasan continuamente y son baratísimos.
textTranslated:
It's a tourist attraction, and not a cheap one (around €30).
We went on Sunday, which is apparently the worst day because many locals also attend. The line was huge, and we had to see the most beautiful part, the paintings, in less than two minutes.
If you're unlucky enough to find yourself in a line that seems to be going nowhere, take the side stairs reserved for tourists only. They're on the right when the gardens end.
At the top, only the lion's claws remain; the rest are ruins.
However, I recommend going to see the lower gardens and the views, but also to climb Pidurangala Rock, the free hill next to it.
If you're not going with a guide, find out about the curious history of this fortress beforehand.
Transportation information: Habarana is a crossroads town with excellent connections to Polonnaruwa, Sigiriya, and Dambulla. Buses run frequently and are very cheap.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Nuria R
text: Las vistas increibles, pero sorprende bastante que cuevas y otros puntos de interés en el recinto de Sigiriya estén faltos en conservación y limpieza teniendo en cuenta que los turistas pagan 30 USD por persona para entrar... (y hay muchísimos turistas entrando a todas horas). Esperava mejor conservación, itinerarios marcados y mapas por ese precio. Repito, vistas increibles y si estás en Sri Lanka lo pagas, pero me llevé la sensación de que es un gran timo a los turistas.
textTranslated: The views are incredible, but it's quite surprising that the caves and other points of interest in the Sigiriya complex are in such poor condition and lack of cleanliness, especially considering that tourists pay $30 USD per person to enter... (and there are tons of tourists going in at all hours). I expected better maintenance, marked trails, and maps for that price. Again, the views are incredible, and if you're in Sri Lanka, you'll pay for it, but I left with the feeling that it's a huge rip-off of tourists.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Manuel Milani
text:
spendere 30$ per salire fino su in cima mi sembra veramente eccessivo….
Super consigliato se si vuole vedere un bel tramonto
textTranslated:
Spending $30 to go all the way to the top seems really excessive to me...
Highly recommended if you want to see a beautiful sunset.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Rod Lopa P.
text:
La verdad que es un sitio bonito pero nada más lejos de la realidad. Si en vez de estar en Sri Lanka estuviera en Albacete (con todos los respetos para este municipio) seguramente no iríamos.
Soy de Burgos y vale más cualquier parte de Merindades o Sierra de la Demanda, que este lugar turístico.
Otra cosa es la cultura del país, ahí sí que puedo aportar una opinión mucho más positiva
textTranslated:
It's true that it's a pretty place, but that's far from the truth. If it were in Albacete (with all due respect to that city) instead of Sri Lanka, we probably wouldn't go.
I'm from Burgos, and any part of the Merindades or Sierra de la Demanda is better than this tourist spot. However, the country's culture is another matter entirely; there I can offer a much more positive opinion.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: nuno duarte
text:
Preço muito elevado 35€ por pessoa!!!
Levar muita água pois o caminho é exigente e muito quente
textTranslated:
Very high price, €35 per person!!!

Bring plenty of water as the path is demanding and very hot.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Janet Van Den Brandhof
text: Prima, zonder gids de treden beklommen heel goed te doen. Ik persoonlijk vond het leuk maar meer ook niet, volgens mij word het meer opgeblazen om daar geweest te zijn
textTranslated: Great, climbing the steps without a guide was very doable. I personally enjoyed it, but nothing more. I think it's overblown just to have been there.

description: The ruins of a 5th-century city, anchored by a towering rock fortress accessible by steep stairs.
title: Sigiriya
name: Happy capy
text: Как по мне, это не стоит 60 долларов. Очень много туристов, сама гора красивая если смотреть на нее снизу, или с дрона. Ничего особенного в общем
textTranslated: For me, it's not worth $60. There are a lot of tourists, and the mountain itself is beautiful when viewed from below or from a drone. Nothing special overall.
